text: NEOT HOVAV HIT AGAIN: Iranian ballistic missile strikes chemical industrial zone south of Be'er Sheva — hazmat leak, 3 specialized teams deployed, 1 lightly wounded. Second strike on facility since late March.
GULF ATTACKS: Bahrain BAPCO oil storage tank hit by Iranian drone — fireball contained. UAE engaged 9 ballistic missiles, 1 cruise missile, 50 drones from Iran targeting aluminum industries.

POPE LEO XIV EASTER: 'Let those who have weapons lay them down! Let those who have the power to unleash wars choose peace!' — Announces April 11 prayer vigil at Basilica. Lamented world 'growing accustomed to violence.'

DAY 37 EVE: F-15E WSO rescued; Neot Hovav hit again (hazmat); Bahrain BAPCO/UAE 60 projectiles engaged; Kuwait infrastructure droned; Pope Easter plea; Rubio arrests Soleimani family; Netanyahu: '70% of steel destroyed'; OPEC+ meeting today; April 6 deadline TOMORROW; Brent $109.24/WTI $111.54; gas $4.10
HAIFA HIT: Iranian ballistic missile direct hit on residential building — 4 injured (1 critical, 82yo), 3-4 missing under rubble including child. Warhead may not have detonated. Search ongoing.
LEBANON: Israeli strikes kill 14 across Beirut and southern Lebanon, wound 39. Strike 100m from Rafik Hariri Hospital. Family of 6 killed in south.
TRUMP EASTER RANT: 'Tuesday will be Power Plant Day and Bridge Day in Iran. Open the F***in' Strait, you crazy bastards!' Set April 7 8PM ET deadline. Revealed US armed Iranian protesters via Kurds.

IRAN REJECTS: Gen. Aliabadi calls Trump ultimatum 'helpless, nervous, unbalanced and stupid.' Warns 'gates of hell will open for US.' IRGC claims downing C-130 + 2 Black Hawks during rescue (unconfirmed).

HORMUZ TALKS: Oman-Iran deputy FM meeting exchanges Hormuz transit proposals. 3 Omani ships transit outside approved corridor. Houthis claim joint IRGC-Hezbollah attack on Ben Gurion Airport — IDF says intercepted.

sources.name: Anadolu Agency — Houthis target Ben Gurion

text: DAY 37 PM: Haifa building struck (3 missing); Lebanon 14 killed/39 wounded; Houthis target Ben Gurion (intercepted); Trump 'Power Plant Day' Easter rant; Iran 'gates of hell' rejection; Oman-Iran Hormuz talks; Markets closed Easter; Brent $109.24/WTI $111.54; gas $4.10; April 7 deadline 2 DAYS

DAY 37 EVE: F-15E WSO rescue confirmed (Delta Force/SEAL Team Six op); Pope Leo Easter peace plea ('lay down weapons'); Rosatom evacuates 198 from Bushehr (50 remain); Rubio revokes Iranian general's relatives' green cards; Gas $4.11/gal; Haifa rescue overnight (3 missing); April 7 Hormuz deadline TOMORROW; Brent $109.24/WTI $111.54

sources.name: NBC News — Pope Leo Easter message

text: HAIFA: 2 confirmed dead, 2 still missing under rubble from overnight Iranian missile strike on residential building. 24 wounded. Cluster bomb missiles also hit Petah Tikva (woman serious) and Haifa (4 light).

LEBANON: Israeli strikes kill 7 in Kfar Hatta (incl. 4yo girl, soldier), 4 killed near Beirut hospital in Jnah (39 wounded). Masnaa border crossing (Lebanon-Syria) forced closed. Hezbollah claims cruise missile hit on warship — IDF denies.

DAY 38 AM: Haifa 2 dead/2 missing; cluster bombs Petah Tikva+Haifa; Lebanon 11 killed; Hezbollah warship claim (IDF denies); IRGC 'new Gulf order'; Iran rejects Trump deadline; Masnaa crossing closed; OPEC+ +206k bpd; Brent $110.82/WTI $112.00; gas $4.10; April 7 deadline TOMORROW

ASSASSINATION: Israel kills IRGC Intelligence Chief Maj. Gen. Majid Khademi + Quds Force Unit 840 commander Asghar Bagheri in dawn Tehran strike — IRGC's No. 2 eliminated in major decapitation operation

SOUTH PARS DESTROYED: Israeli strikes obliterate Asaluyeh petrochemical complex — 5 killed, 170 injured. 85% of Iran's petrochemical exports now offline. Sharif University electronics research center also hit in Tehran.

CLUSTER ATTACK: Iranian cluster munitions hit Ramat Gan, Bnei Brak, Givatayim — 2 killed (elderly couple), 28+ bomblet impact sites across Tel Aviv suburbs. Haifa building collapse: all 4 missing confirmed dead after 18-hour rescue.

ISLAMABAD ACCORD: Egypt/Pakistan/Turkey submit 45-day ceasefire proposal to US + Iran. Phase 1: ceasefire + Hormuz reopening. Phase 2: permanent deal. Iran rejects temporary Hormuz opening. Pakistan FM Munir in overnight talks with VP Vance.

DAY 38 PM: Khademi+Bagheri killed in Tehran; South Pars petrochemical destroyed (5 dead, 170 hurt); Sharif Univ struck; cluster bombs kill 2 Ramat Gan; Haifa 4 dead; 45-day ceasefire proposal; Qatar LNG attempts Hormuz; Iraqi tanker exemption; IRGC claims USS Tripoli attack (unverified); Brent $110.82/WTI $111.54; gas $4.104; April 7 deadline TOMORROW
